channel.title: Ashraf El Desoky – Articles
channel.description: Articles and insights on project management, telecommunications, and digital transformation

item.title: Earned Value Management: A Complete Guide
item.description: Master EVM fundamentals — PV, EV, AC, CPI, SPI — and learn how to use them to forecast project health with real-world examples.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Network Rollout: Lessons from 10 Years with STC
item.description: Key lessons from managing one of the largest FTTH rollout programmes in the Middle East — planning, execution, and challenges.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Building a High-Performance PMO: A Framework for Excellence
item.description: A practical framework for establishing and maturing a Project Management Office that drives organizational success — from governance to KPIs.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Digital Transformation in Construction: From Paper to Platform
item.description: How traditional construction and telecom companies can leverage digital tools — ERP, BIM, and automation — to transform operations and boost productivity.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: 5G Infrastructure Rollout: Project Management Challenges & Solutions
item.description: Managing 5G network deployment at scale — site acquisition, RF planning, vendor coordination, and the risk management strategies that keep rollout on track.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PMBOK 8th Edition: A New Era for Project Management
item.description: The PMBOK 8th Edition shifts focus from processes to outcomes and performance domains.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Stakeholder Performance Domain in PMBOK 8
item.description: Stakeholders influence every aspect of a project.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Team Performance Domain: Building High-Performing Teams
item.description: A high-performing team is essential for project success.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Development Approach and Life Cycle Performance Domain
item.description: Choosing the right development approach shapes project delivery.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Planning Performance Domain: From Strategy to Action
item.description: Planning turns strategy into actionable project steps.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Project Work Performance Domain in Practice
item.description: Project work transforms plans into deliverables.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Delivery Performance Domain: Scope and Quality
item.description: Delivery is about producing the right outputs with the right quality.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Measurement Performance Domain: Metrics That Matter
item.description: Measurement turns project data into actionable insight.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Uncertainty Performance Domain: Managing the Unknown
item.description: Projects operate in environments full of uncertainty.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: The Agile Mindset: Values and Principles
item.description: Agile is more than a methodology; it is a mindset.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Scrum Framework Explained
item.description: Scrum is the most popular agile framework.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Kanban Method: Visualize and Optimize Flow
item.description: Kanban helps teams visualize work and limit work in progress.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Agile Planning: Adaptive and Continuous
item.description: Agile planning happens at multiple levels continuously.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Writing Effective User Stories
item.description: User stories capture requirements from the user's perspective.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Agile Estimation Techniques
item.description: Agile estimation focuses on relative size, not exact hours.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Servant Leadership in Project Management
item.description: Servant leaders prioritize the needs of their team.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Emotional Intelligence for Project Managers
item.description: Emotional intelligence helps project managers lead people effectively.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Conflict Management Strategies
item.description: Conflict is inevitable in projects; how you handle it matters.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Business Acumen for Project Managers
item.description: Project managers must understand the business context of their projects.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Stakeholder Engagement for Business Results
item.description: Stakeholder engagement drives business value and project success.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Value Delivery in PMBOK 8
item.description: PMBOK 8 places value delivery at the center of project management.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky
